reference: PARR WAS SUCH A CONTINUAL SMOKER THAT ANYONE WHO CAME INTO HIS COMPANY IF HE HAD NEVER SMOKED BEFORE HAD TO LEARN THE USE OF A PIPE AS A MEANS OF SELF DEFENCE
text: Par was such a continuous smoker that anyone who came into his company, if he had never smoked before, had to learn the use of a pipe as a means of self-defense.
